title: pyrotis gilgiana var. witteana
intro: Pyrotis gilgiana var. witteana, also known as the Witte's pygmy chrysanthemum, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are derived from its bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pyrotis gilgiana var. witteana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
